scripts.dev: concurrently -k "pnpm run dev:renderer" "pnpm run dev:main" "pnpm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:main: tsup src/main/main.ts src/main/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --external electron --sourcemap --watch --out-dir dist/main
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 dist/main/main.js dist/main/preload.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build:main: tsup src/main/main.ts src/main/preload.ts --format cjs --platform node --target node22 --external electron --sourcemap --out-dir dist/main
